title: stelis gnoma
intro: Stelis gnoma, also known as the Butterfly Orchid, is a type of epiphytic orchid native to Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stelis gnoma include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce pain and inflammation. Herbal preparations of Stelis gnoma include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, syrups, and topical creams for various health applications.
